# kUSBInformationRootHubIsBuiltInBit

**Enumeration Case**

The bit indicating that the root hub is built-in.

## Declaration

```swift
kUSBInformationRootHubIsBuiltInBit = 10
```
title: kUSBInformationRootHubIsBuiltInBit
